task: Move the black spectacle case to the left side of the desk
raw:
Scene: black_spectacle_case, desk, lamp, monitor, keyboard, cup
Step 1: reach(black_spectacle_case)
  affordance_region: the black spectacle case
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_spectacle_case, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_spectacle_case) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_spectacle_case)
  affordance_region: the handle of the black spectacle case
  contact: holding(black_spectacle_case) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_spectacle_case)
Step 3: transport(black_spectacle_case -> left_side_of_desk)
  affordance_region: the left side of the desk
  spatial: above(black_spectacle_case, desk, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_spectacle_case)
  done_when: above(black_spectacle_case, desk, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_spectacle_case -> left_side_of_desk)
  affordance_region: the left side of the desk
  contact: surface_contact(black_spectacle_case, desk) [completion]; released(black_spectacle_case) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_spectacle_case) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_spectacle_case, desk) AND released(black_spectacle_case) AND stable(black_spectacle_case)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the handle of the black spectacle case
the left side of the desk
the left side of the desk
steps.done_when: surface_contact(black_spectacle_case, desk) AND released(black_spectacle_case) AND stable(black_spectacle_case)
